channel.title: engineering on Dr. Soumyo Maity
channel.description: Recent content in engineering on Dr. Soumyo Maity

item.title: Security Engineering
item.description: Security engineering is the application of engineering principles to the design, development, and operation of secure systems. It is a broad field that encompasses a wide range of topics, including: Security architecture: The design of secure systems and networks. Security analysis: The identification and assessment of security risks. Security testing: The evaluation of security controls to ensure that they are effective. Security assurance: The process of providing confidence that a system is secure.
